warnings: This page (A-01) actually contains 3 distinct patterns side by side: this per-sheet architectural index (left column table 'รายการแบบสถาปัตยกรรม (A)'), a material spec list (middle column 'รายการวัสดุ'), and a drawing-symbol legend (right column 'รายการสัญลักษณ์ประกอบแบบ'). Split into 3 sibling files: _หน้า03_index.json (this file), _หน้า03_material_list.json, _หน้า03_symbol_legend.json.
doc_page_start/end values here were cross-checked against the actual printed footer page numbers on pages 03-17 (1 through 15) during this same extraction session and match exactly.
Independent re-read agrees with the round-1 (t1) extraction for this page (t1's หน้า03_index.json) — same 15 sheet titles, same A-01..A-15 mapping. No disagreement found.
